tools.name: AnnotAISE
tools.description: A form-driven platform that replaces messy spreadsheets with guided workflows for creating, distributing, and auditing large-scale manual annotations.
tools.longDescription: AnnotAISE is a comprehensive web-based annotation platform designed to streamline the entire lifecycle of data labeling tools. Born from the challenges faced by research teams managing large-scale annotation campaigns through spreadsheets and email chains, AnnotAISE provides a centralized solution that handles everything from tool setup to quality assurance. The platform features an intuitive admin dashboard for creating and managing labeling campaigns, a clean and keyboard-friendly interface for annotators, and powerful analytics tools that calculate inter-annotator agreement metrics in real-time. With support for multiple annotation schemas, role-based access control, and audit-ready exports with full provenance tracking, AnnotAISE enables research teams to scale their annotation efforts while maintaining high quality standards. The system is particularly optimized for Portuguese and English corpora, addressing the unique challenges of multilingual NLP research.
objectives: Reduce setup time for a new labeling campaign from days to hours
Increase annotation throughput and agreement for Portuguese/English corpora
Provide audit-ready exports with full provenance
features: Admin space for tool and campaign management
Clean labeler UI with keyboard-friendly forms
QA & analytics with inter-annotator agreement metrics
publication_relationships: On the usefulness of automatically generated microservice architectures
Unraveling the Impact of Code Smell Agglomerations on Code Stability
An exploratory evaluation of code smell agglomerations
Mental Health and Productivity in Software Development: A Study with the Bravo Central Platform

tools.name: SMP (BuddyMents)
tools.description: A mobile-first app that helps companies track mental-health and productivity signals—without creepy surveillance—using short daily check-ins and team dashboards.
tools.longDescription: BuddyMents (SMP - Saúde Mental e Produtividade) represents a paradigm shift in how organizations monitor and support employee wellbeing. Rather than relying on intrusive surveillance or infrequent surveys, the platform uses brief daily check-ins that take just 10 seconds to complete. Employees use intuitive sliders to rate their mental health state and productivity levels, creating a continuous stream of data that reveals trends and potential issues before they become critical. The system measures both Individual Perceived Productivity (IPP) and Team Perceived Productivity (TPP), with research showing that misalignment between these metrics serves as an early warning sign of burnout. Company dashboards provide HR and team leads with actionable insights through trend analysis, alignment gap detection, and anomaly alerts—all while maintaining strict privacy protections. Unlike traditional wellness programs that feel like checkbox exercises, BuddyMents integrates seamlessly into daily workflows and provides value to both employees and employers through its privacy-first, non-surveillance approach.
objectives: Track mental health and productivity metrics in real-time
Provide actionable insights for HR and team leads
Replace clunky spreadsheet surveys with guided flows
features: Team dashboards with trends and alignment gaps
Admin console for team management and exports
publication_relationships: On the usefulness of automatically generated microservice architectures
Unraveling the Impact of Code Smell Agglomerations on Code Stability
An exploratory evaluation of code smell agglomerations
Mental Health and Productivity in Software Development: A Study with the Bravo Central Platform
